query:
UPDATE storeItems SET thumbnailUrl = CASE id
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 1) THEN '/clothing-1.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 1,1) THEN '/clothing-2.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 2,1) THEN '/clothing-3.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 3,1) THEN '/clothing-4.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 4,1) THEN '/clothing-5.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 5,1) THEN '/clothing-6.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 6,1) THEN '/clothing-7.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 7,1) THEN '/clothing-8.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 8,1) THEN '/clothing-9.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 9,1) THEN '/clothing-10.png'
  WHEN (SELECT id FROM storeItems WHERE category = 'clothing' ORDER BY id LIMIT 10,1) THEN '/clothing-11.png'
END WHERE category = 'clothing';
